ddls:
CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "po_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product associated with the purchase order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase order (e.g., pending, fulfilled, canceled) */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was placed */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "ship_to" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "ship_from" TEXT /* Shipping origin for the order */,
  "order_total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., pending, paid, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("po_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bins" (
  "bin_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each bin */,
  "bin_location" TEXT /* Location of the bin within the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the bin */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level in the bin */,
  "bin_type" TEXT /* Type of bin (e.g., shelving, pallet, floor) */,
  "aisle" TEXT /* Aisle number where the bin is located */,
  "bay" TEXT /* Bay number where the bin is located */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level where the bin is located */,
  "bin_height" TEXT /* Height of the bin */,
  "bin_width" TEXT /* Width of the bin */,
  "bin_depth" TEXT /* Depth of the bin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "po_id" TEXT /* ID of the purchase order associated with the inventory */,
  "bin_id" TEXT /* ID of the bin where the product is stored */,
  "std_pack" INTEGER /* Standard packaging quantity for the product */,
  "boxes" INTEGER /* Number of boxes of the product in the bin */,
  "partial_qty" INTEGER /* Partial quantity of the product in the bin */,
  "total_qty" INTEGER /* Total quantity of the product in the bin */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the product */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the product (if applicable) */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Required storage conditions for the product (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory (e.g., available, allocated, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_bin_id FOREIGN KEY ("bin_id") REFERENCES bins ("bin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) for the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., electrical, mechanical) */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  "unit_weight" TEXT /* Weight of a single unit of the product */,
  "unit_volume" TEXT /* Volume of a single unit of the product */,
  "unit_cost" TEXT /* Cost of a single unit of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control check */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality control check was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "inspector_id" TEXT /* ID of the inspector who performed the check */,
  "qc_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality control check (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  "qc_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the quality control check */,
  "qc_attachment" TEXT /* Attachment or file related to the quality control check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the inspector belongs to */,
  "inspector_title" TEXT /* Title of the inspector (e.g., quality control manager) */,
  "inspector_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, operator, admin) */,
  "user_title" TEXT /* Title of the user (e.g., warehouse manager) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_city" TEXT /* City where the warehouse is located */,
  "warehouse_state" TEXT /* State where the warehouse is located */,
  "warehouse_zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_country" TEXT /* Country where the warehouse is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "po_id" TEXT /* ID of the purchase order associated with the shipment */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used (e.g., ground, air, sea) */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receiving" (
  "receipt_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each receipt */,
  "po_id" TEXT /* ID of the purchase order associated with the receipt */,
  "receipt_date" TEXT /* Date the receipt was received */,
  "receipt_status" TEXT /* Status of the receipt (e.g., received, pending, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receipt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receiving_po_id FOREIGN KEY ("po_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("po_id")
)
